title: Elucidating the Mechanism of Hydrogen Evolution on Platinum Electrodes in Concentrated Hydrogen-Bonded Electrolytes
authors: Zeynep Bagbudar, Zeru Syum, Quincy Spitzer, Robert E Warburton and Jesse Wainright
abstract: The hydrogen evolution reaction (HER) is a parasitic side reaction in energy storage systems with protic electrolytes. HER has been widely studied in aqueous electrolytes, but the reaction mechanism is less well established in nonaqueous media. Herein, a combination of experimental and computational electrochemistry is used to investigate HER mechanisms on platinum electrodes in various concentrated hydrogen-bonded electrolytes (CoHBEs). The electrolytes studied consist of a mixture of levulinic acid and three different imidazole derivatives. Cyclic voltammetry, potentiostatic electrochemical …
